Throne Room.description: A grand room with a majestic throne on a raised platform on one end.

Bedroom.description: A lavish royal bedchamber. The curtained bed sits in the middle of the room.

Bathroom.description: An elegant bathroom with gilded appliances.

Courtyard.description: A beautifully planted yard with a fountain in the middle and a hedge maze.

Interior.description: A worn-down room with counters covered in items. One wall is entirely bookcases.

Yard.description: A small outdoor space enclosed by fences. There is a garden bed in one half.

Forest.description: An old forest with huge trees and deep undergrowth.

Square.description: A central area of a village that is very empty. There is a large statue in the center.

Food Stall.description: A wooden stall that advertises food for sale. There is no one here.

Blacksmith.description: A clearly well used smithy. Tools have been left around, there appear to still be some coals alive in the furnace.
